primary_market_v1.label: Primary Market V1
primary_market_v1.description: V3 first primary-market investor prompt set. Scoring and extraction are versioned separately from Telegram formatting.

v2_legacy.label: V2 Legacy Baseline
v2_legacy.description: Unmodified V2 screening and extraction prompts for baseline comparison only.

v2_stable_cn.label: V2 Stable Chinese
v2_stable_cn.description: Production-oriented V2 stable screening/extraction style adapted to the V3 parser contract, with source scoring, content compression, and Chinese-first Telegram formatting.

rimbo_source_scored_v3.label: Rimbo Source-Scored V3
rimbo_source_scored_v3.description: Source-tier/D1-D5 aware V3 prompt bundle with content compression and source-score fields for Rimbo-style trust evaluation.
